jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at FoodWorld
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld:
FoodWorld is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld!
